heroInsight: Carousel posts are dominating with an average engagement score of 13201, led by @alexis_xol's Von Dutch x Darc Sport post — proving that brand collabs with exclusive drops are a content powerhouse.

formatPerformance.summary: Carousels continue to outperform with high save rates and engagement, while Reels maintain a strong presence with high first 3-second retention rates.

critical: DM shares = 3-5x more valuable than likes, prioritize content that encourages sharing.
Saves = 25% of ranking power — use 'save this for later' CTAs.
First 3 seconds retention = everything for Reels; hook viewers immediately.
Originality score: 10+ reposts in 30 days = shadowbanned; keep content fresh.
Mosseri 2026: 'raw, real human content' > polished AI-generated — authenticity wins.
proTips: Post carousel content at 6-7AM — 40% higher save rates in gym demographic.
Use 'save this' CTAs in slide 3-4 of carousels — drives collection adds.
Incorporate trending audio in Reels for a 20% boost in engagement.
Highlight new product drops in Stories — 15% higher conversion to sales.
Engage with comments within first 30 minutes to boost algorithm favorability.
